programme.title: Joe Smith Jr vs Maxim Vlasov
programme.desc: On April 10th, 2021, Joe Smith Jr fought Maxim Vlasov for the WBO World Light Heavyweight Title at Osage Casino in Tulsa. In a great battle, Joe Smith Jr barely pulled off a very close majority decision victory.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Arturo Gatti
programme.desc: On June 25th, 2005 Floyd Mayweather fought Arturo Gatti at the Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City for the WBC World Super Lightweight title with Gatti down in round 1 the fight ended in a victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Jose Ramirez vs Antonio Orozco
programme.desc: On September 14th, 2018 Jose Ramirez faced Antonio Orozco for the WBC World Super Lightweight title at the Save Mart Arena in Fresno, Ca. with Orozco suffering legal eye cuts in round 4 and 6 Ramirez was able to secure the unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Sugar Ray Leonard 1
programme.desc: On December 7th, 1989 Roberto Duran and Sugar Ray Leonard fought for the first time for the WBC World Super Middleweight at the Mirage Hotel in Las Vegas resulting in a unanimous decision win for Leonard.

programme.title: Hector Camacho vs Sugar Ray Leonard
programme.desc: On January 3rd, 1997 Hector Camacho faced Sugar Ray Leonard at the Convention Center in Atlantic City battling for IBC Middleweight title the bout ended after five rounds resulting in a victory for Leonard by technical knockout.

programme.title: George Foreman vs Adilson Rodrigues
programme.desc: On June 16th, 1990 George Foreman fought Adilson Rodrigues at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas resulting in a victory for Foreman in round two by technical knockout.

programme.title: Thomas Hearns vs Juan Domingo Roldan
programme.desc: On October 29th, 1987 Thomas Hearns faced Juan Domingo Roldan for the vacant WBC World Middleweight title at the Las Vegas Hilton the 12 round bout went only 4 rounds ending with a knockout by Hearns securing the victory.

programme.title: Sergio Martinez vs Julio Cesar Chavez Jr
programme.desc: On September 15th, 2012, Sergio Martinez fought Julio Cesar Chavez Jr for the WBC Middleweight Title at the Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. Despite an incredible effort from Chavez Jr in the final round, Martinez survived and won by decision.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Wilfred Benitez
programme.desc: On November 30th, 1979 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Wilfred Benitez for the WBC World Welterweight title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas that went 15 rounds but ended in technical knockout giving the victory to Leonard.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Cleveland Williams
programme.desc: On November 14th, 1966 Muhammad Ali faced Cleveland Williams at the Astrodome in Houston, TX. They fought for WBC World Heavyweight titles in what was supposed to be a 15 round bout only went 3 resulting in a win for Ali.

programme.title: Evander Holyfield vs George Foreman
programme.desc: On April 19th, 1991, Evander Holyfield fought George Foreman for the WBC, WBA, and IBF Heavyweight Titles in Atlantic City. Both fighters displayed incredible skill and resilience, but Holyfield ultimately emerged victorious after 12 rounds.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Mac Foster
programme.desc: On April 1st, 1972 Muhammad Ali and Mac Foster fought in a fifteen round bout that ended in a unanimous decision win for Ali.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Manny Pacquiao
programme.desc: On May 2nd, 2015, Floyd Mayweather fought Manny Pacquiao in what was labeled as the "Fight of the Century." Floyd Mayweather emerged victorious via a unanimous decision, showcasing his exceptional defensive skills against Pacquiao's aggressive style.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Zab Judah
programme.desc: On April 8th, 2006, Floyd Mayweather fought Zab Judah for the IBF and IBO Welterweight Titles at Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. In a fight with a dramatic melee in round 10, Mayweather cruised in the later rounds to win by unanimous decision.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs DeMarcus Corley
programme.desc: On May 22nd, 2004 Floyd Mayweather fought DeMarcus Corley at the Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City for the WBC World Light Welterweight Title eliminator with Corely going down in round 8 and round 10 resulting in a win for Mayweather.

programme.desc: Everyone comes together to plan a surprise wedding for Phil and Kay, setting up a special ceremony on their land, which the whole family attends. Si distracts Phil and Kay by taking them on a "trip down memory lane".

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: After discovering that Martin has to miss a Friday night poker game for a date, the guys (as well as their wives) take turns figuring out the best way to coach him for romance. When babysitting for Jep and Jessica turns into a rocky road.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The guys realize that Godwin has never really asked them for a favor, even though they are all always helping each other out. Godwin asks them to help him get a hot tub, so they set out to help him pick one up.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Due to construction at Jase and Missy's house, Willie and Korie invite Jase and the kids to live with them while Missy is out of town visiting friends. Then, what begins in the duck call room as a series of "Gentlemen's Bets".

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Because of a termite problem at Duck Commander, the guys are forced to find a different location to work from--Godwin's House. But while at Godwin's house, Godwin gets a taxidermied gift from a past relative.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The truckers look back at their experiences during the last ice road season and explain what they do now that they're off the ice. Tensions are sure to be high as both Rick and Drew have not spoken to Hugh since leaving the ice roads prematurely.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Aerialbots are thrown back in time to Cybertron's Golden Age. While there, they learn the truth of Megatron's early treachery as well as witness firsthand the creation of Cybertron's greatest hero, Optimus Prime!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Megatron becomes infected with cosmic rust, a metal-consuming plague. When Autobot scientist Perceptor is forced to find a cure for Megatron, the entire Autobot civilization is again put at risk of extinction. But an Autobot invention may save them...

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: After a failed attempt on Megatron's life, Starscream is banished to a deserted island. There he finds the remains of World War II battle vehicles and decides to use them as the basis for his own attack team, the Combaticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: United as “Bruticus,” the Combaticons are virtually unstoppable. They plan to pull the Earth into the Sun to eliminate all of their enemies at once. The only hope is for the Autobots and Decepticons to join forces to take Bruticus down!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons and Insecticons team up to attack a defense base filled with data that Megatron wants to get his hands on. When the Insecticons connect with the base's energy shield, they unexpectedly grow larger…and potentially explosive!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons gain control over the Quantum Laboratories facility and begin to re-route oil tankers to be harvested for energy. The Autobots and Spike must attack on two fronts to keep Megatron from converting the power of the enormous oil tanker fleet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons gain control over the Quantum Laboratories facility and begin to re-route oil tankers to be harvested for energy. The Autobots and Spike must attack on two fronts to keep Megatron from converting the power of the enormous oil tanker fleet.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: The Autobots split into two teams, one facing an old foe of Bumblebee's and the other a Decepticon in the polar wastes.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: With an old score to settle, Bumblebee insists on taking on OVERLOAD alone, while a weakened Optimus must learn to contribute in ways others than combat if his team is to bring down POLARCLAW.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: As Steeljaw learns of a community of Decepticons in a surprising location, Grimlock and Strongarm struggle to improve their teamwork as, together with Bumblebee, they face SABERHORN.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: After a mistake in the field, Strongarm takes herself out of action just when the team needs her most against fire-­‐starting Decepticons CRAZYBOLT and SLICEDICE.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Windblade's concern for Optimus' wellbeing may spell doom for the entire Away Team when they run up against a sly hunter of a Decepticon named RAZORPAW.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Grimlock forgets how to fight when, in an effort to become smarter, he downloads a huge amount of data into his brain and overwrites his combat instincts.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: More hints about Decepticon Island are revealed when Steeljaw invades the Scrapyard with a clever plan, and Bumblebee, Grimlock and Strongarm confront SCORPONOK, one of the Island's leaders.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: After being coaxed into going to a concert given by his favorite band, Bumblebee hopes for a quiet evening away from the Scrapyard, but finds action and danger when BISK attacks the arena.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons gain control over the Quantum Laboratories facility and begin to re-route oil tankers to be harvested for energy. The Autobots and Spike must attack on two fronts to keep Megatron from converting the power of the enormous oil tanker fleet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. The Autobots are banished from Earth, placed in a spacecraft and set on a crash course for the Sun due to a plan by Megatron and human industrialist Sean Burger. With the Autobots gone, the Decepticons are free to do as they please.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As the Autobots watch over the powerful Negavator prototype weapon for the military, an attack, and accident leaves Red Alert malfunctioning and paranoid of his fellow Autobots. Confused, he strikes a partnership with the evil Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As the Autobots watch over the powerful Negavator prototype weapon for the military, an attack and accident leaves Red Alert malfunctioning and paranoid of his fellow Autobots. Confused, he strikes a partnership with the evil Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. The Autobots and Decepticons begin to malfunction, losing their powers due to a lack of the compound Cybertronium on Earth. But the Dinobots are fully functional and in no need of Cybertronium, and the Dinobot Grimlocks has plans of his own!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. The Autobots and Decepticons begin to malfunction, losing their powers due to a lack of the compound Cybertronium on Earth. But the Dinobots are fully functional and in no need of Cybertronium, and the Dinobot Grimlocks has plans of his own!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Spike and Carlee are stranded on Cybertron, desperate to find the Cybertronium needed to heal the ailing Autobots on Earth. Their only hope is to free the Dinobots, who are on Cybertron under the control of Shockwave's brainwashing program.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When Starscream inadvertently activates a time machine, he and his fellow Decepticons are sent back to medieval times. Luckily Spike, Hoist, and Warpath follow them back, and with help from Merlin, they are prepared to defend the kingdom from them.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: The Maximals awaken on their home world of Cybertron, with no memory of how they got there. Unable to Transform, they are hunted down by mindless vehicle Transformer drones.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: The Maximals learn how to transform and gain access to the Council Citadel. There, they learn that Megatron has taken over the planet and intends to wipe out all organic life.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: While searching for clues to their missing memories, Blackarachnia and Rattrap encounter Jetstorm, Thrust and Tankor – three deadly new Vehicon Generals created by Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: As the Vehicon Generals continue to hunt the Maximals, Rattrap discovers a counter-virus that helps him Transform – but once he starts, he can't stop.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: The Maximals discover a new Beast Mode Maximal – a bat named Nightscream – and a mysterious fruit tree, neither of which should exist on the machine world of Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: Rattrap finally learns how to Transform, only to discover his Robot Mode has no weapons. With nowhere else to turn for protection, he strikes a deal with Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: The Maximals discover a junkyard facility where the robot shells of the missing Transformers are stored. Meanwhile, Blackarachnia is utterly convinced that Thrust's spark is Silverbolt's.

programme.title: Follow the Rules

programme.title: Follow the Rules
programme.desc: When Ja has a concert in NYC, Jeff turns Brittney's low key night with friends into a raging house party. The grannies use Ja's performance as an excuse to go man hunting.

programme.title: Follow the Rules
programme.desc: Jordy goes on his first date with help from Ja and Brittney. After being grounded for slacking off at school, Jeff sneaks out of the house to go to a strip club.

programme.title: Follow the Rules
programme.desc: Ja becomes Mr. Mom and quickly learns that a woman's work is never done. Brittney transforms into 'Bri-yonce' in hopes of finding her Jay-Z at a college costume party.

programme.title: Follow the Rules
programme.desc: Brittney brings her new boyfriend home for Thanksgiving, and Ja gets more information about their relationship than he bargained for. The grannies compete to see who can bake the best pie.

programme.title: Follow the Rules

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: Run's blood boils upon finding that his backyard pool house has become filled with family junk. He vows to clean it out, which unleashes conflict with every family member who wants to hang onto some possession.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: Run often talks about how much he loves to win, but it's not until we see his family compete against one another that we understand that the drive to dominate runs thick in the Simmons blood.

programme.title: Run's House

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: When Vanessa gets a call from her Ford modeling agent to do a fashion shoot in Colorado, Run decides that bringing the family along for a summer vacation would be the perfect adventure to share before school starts.

programme.desc: Looking at baby photos sparks Justine's desire to have another baby. Rev Run tries to convince Justine otherwise, but she is certain about what she wants.

programme.title: Run's House

programme.desc: Vanessa is approached to pose in Maxim Magazine but is concerned about her father's reaction. Meanwhile, Jojo tries to pass his "behind-the-wheel" test for his Driver's Permit. And the Rev gets a "sign" to buy a new Lamborghini.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: Rev has a shoe convention to attend in Las Vegas and takes the family with him. Rev enlists help from Vanessa and Angela to plan a surprise for Justine.

programme.title: Run's House

programme.title: Run's House

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: Seeking relief from the stress of his life, Run seeks the advice of his brother, Russell. Run decides to shadow his brother and give yoga a try in hopes that peace will find him.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: Mom and Dad express concern over Russy's temper and decide to get professional help.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origin of Duel Monsters is revealed. Using the magic of the Millennium Necklace, Egyptian historian Ishizu Ishtar shows Kaiba how Duel Monsters was played millenniums ago.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The spirit of the Millennium Puzzle realizes that his memories of ancient Egypt have faded, but Tea helps him uncover the mysteries of his past.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi learns that he was a powerful Pharaoh who saved the world five thousand years ago, and he must now save the world again.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey is cornered by a group of sinister Rare Hunters who force Joey into a duel. If he loses, the Rare Hunters get his precious Red-Eyes Black Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's time to master new rules and monsters; let the Battle City Tournament commence! In the first duel of the tournament, Yugi challenges the Rare Hunter to win back Joey's Red-Eyes Black Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi figures out the Rare Hunter's strategy to summon the almighty Exodia, but it's too late to stop him. The Rare Hunter already has four pieces of Exodia in his hand, and the fifth and final piece is on top of his deck.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The psychic duelist Espa Roba defeats Rex Raptor as easy as a chumpasaurus, and Joey's next on his hit list. What chance does Joey have when Espa Roba has the telepathic ability to read all the cards in Joey's hand?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey discovers that Espa Roba's extrasensory perception was a hoax, that he's not yet free from Espa's mental manipulations.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The magician duelist Arkana transports Yugi to the world's most lethal dueling arena where the loser gets sent to the Shadow Realm. Yugi must win this duel or he'll lose much more than his Dark Magician.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's Dark Magician versus Dark Magician! However, while Yugi only controls one Dark Magician, Arkana has three residing in his deck. Though outnumbered, Yugi will never give up as long as he believes in the heart of the cards.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: To counter Arkana's Dark Magician, Yugi pulls a rabbit out of his hat: the Dark Magician Girl!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The trickster Weevil Underwood spins a web of lies to bait Joey into a lopsided duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey swats Perfectly Ultimate Great Moth only to have Weevil let loose the ferocious Insect Queen, the crown jewel of insects that grows in strength for every creepy crawler it cannibalizes. Will Weevil's royal ravager swarm Joey into submission?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi faces off against another of Marik's nefarious Rare Hunters, the silent but deadly Strings.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Strings summons one of the most powerful creatures in the history of Duel Monsters: the Egyptian God Monster Slifer the Sky Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The magic card Infinite Cards allows Strings to hold an unlimited number of cards in his hand.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey squares off against the sea duelist Mako Tsunami and his bevy of underwater beasts. If Joey wins, he'll have all six Locator Cards necessary to enter the Battle City Finals, but if he loses, he can kiss the finals goodbye.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mako's oceanic warrior, The Legendary Fisherman, unleashes a wave of destruction by stealthily destroying Joey's monsters from the depths of the sea. Joey has to put his skills, training, and experience to the ultimate test before he's all washed out.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik, with the help of Bakura, kidnaps Joey and Tea. The Rare Hunters also kidnap Mokuba to force Yugi and Kaiba to take on tag team duelists Umbra and Lumis on top of a skyscraper. The losers will be sent plummeting into the Shadow Realm.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Lumis and Umbra systematically dismantle Yugi and Kaiba's tumultuous teamwork. Can Yugi and Kaiba learn to put their differences aside before they're sent on a one-way trip into the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba start to exhibit signs of teamwork, but it's too little too late when Umbra and Lumis summon Masked Beast Des Gardius.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi combines his magnetic monsters into the polar powerhouse Valkyrion the Magna Warrior!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba are on a rescue mission to save their friends. But along the way, all their worries and secrets are revealed as they relive the troubles they've faced and will face in the future.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's friend versus friend as Marik mind controls Joey to duel against Yugi. The loser will be dragged into the ocean to sleep with the fishes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Though Joey decimates Yugi's life points, Yugi can't bring himself to attack his dear friend. Yugi summons Joey's favorite monster Red-Eyes Black Dragon to bring Joey back to his senses.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi starts to break Marik's spell over Joey, but he now must duel without the Millennium Puzzle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: While the cadets work on their snowboarding badge, a falling tree knocks a gondola loose; the Cadets help Davey Hasselhawg give the little Turkskis a swim lesson, and then have to rescue Davey from a whirlpool.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Cap'n Dilly and the Cadets build a Pirate Playzone in Ker-Splash Canyon; the Dodos think Brody is the legendary Dodo King and do whatever he says until Baddy McBat takes the crown.

programme.title: Top Wing

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: The Cadets discover a haunted pirate treasure and sneak into Pirate Town to find out who or what is haunting it; Bea helps Penny with her Underwater Repair Badge when Earl's submersible barge springs a leak and needs rescuing.

programme.desc: The Cadets celebrate Christmas with Penny's penguin family; when Santa crashes on his way to deliver the penguin's presents, the Cadets have to rescue Santa and Penny's little brother.
